title: Add Input Validation for Passcode Parameter
description: Add server-side input validation to ensure the passcode URL parameter consists of exactly a 6-digit number before processing. Uses a regular expression (`/^\d{6}$/`) to validate the format, rejecting any input that does not match the expected pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Passcode parameter is validated against a 6-digit numeric pattern before processing
Invalid passcode formats are rejected with an appropriate error response
Valid 6-digit passcodes continue to work as expected
Regex validation runs before any database query
middleware_changes: Added preg_match validation against /^\d{6}$/ pattern before processing the passcode parameter.
implementation_notes: Input validation added using PHP preg_match to enforce a 6-digit numeric format. This provides defense-in-depth alongside the prepared statements fix in MBT-147.
comment_summary: Developer implemented and submitted for review promptly.
